requisitoLingua.citazione: Avoir une connaissance de la langue française niveau B1 minimum (le niveau B2 est conseillé).

scadenzeOspitante.citazione: Pour un séjour au premier semestre ou à l’année : 15 mai. Pour un séjour au deuxième semestre : 31 octobre.

notaDisponibilita.citazione: Some Master's (Year 1 and Year 2) courses may not be open to exchange students.

requisitoLingua.citazione: Required language skills for incoming students: English (B1+) or Polish (B1+)

scadenzeOspitante.citazione: For the upcoming fall semester: by April 30; For the upcoming spring semester: by October 31. Applications are accepted only through the Mobility Online platform. For the upcoming fall semester: by May 15. For the upcoming spring semester: by November 15.
